videos.headline: Omar Daniels takes Duke fumble 95 yards to the house
videos.description: Georgia Tech strikes first as Omar Daniels recovers a Duke fumble and returns it 95 yards for the touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Omar Daniels takes Duke fumble 95 yards to the house) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Duke's field goal attempt goes awry
videos.description: Duke has miscommunication on its field goal attempt, and Georgia Tech keeps the Blue Devils off the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Duke's field goal attempt goes awry) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Duke's Jake Taylor makes ridiculous bobbling catch
videos.description: After a wild tip off his own fingers, Jake Taylor somehow tracks it down and makes an incredible diving grab for Duke.
